commit_message: chore(infra): migrate domain to nigerconnect.app + split admin to tenant subdomain

migration.detail: 16 migrations found, 0 pending — schema unchanged in this commit

health_checks.containers: all healthy — api, web, postgres, redis, minio

tls_acme_status: BLOCKED — Cloudflare API token does not have access to the nigerconnect.app zone. All 4 hosts failing with: 'failed to find zone nigerconnect.app.: zone could not be found'. Action required: add nigerconnect.app zone permissions to the Cloudflare API token used by Traefik letsencrypt-dns resolver.

dns_status.api.nigerconnect.app: MISSING — no A/AAAA record in Cloudflare
dns_status.cdn.nigerconnect.app: MISSING — no A/AAAA record in Cloudflare

rollback_command: git archive HEAD~1 | ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@46.224.193.109 'cd /opt/apps/nigerConnect && tar xf - && find . -name "*.sh" -exec sed -i "s/\r$//" {} + && chmod +x scripts/*.sh && ./scripts/deploy-vps.sh'
notes: Containers and code deployed successfully. Two blocking items require manual action before the new domains are live: (1) DNS missing for api.nigerconnect.app and cdn.nigerconnect.app — add A records in Cloudflare pointing to 46.224.193.109 (or as proxied CNAME). (2) Traefik Cloudflare API token must be granted Zone:Read + DNS:Edit for the nigerconnect.app zone — Traefik cannot issue Let's Encrypt DNS-01 certs for any of the 4 new hosts until this is done.
